0.title: Prime Factorization
0.objective: I can write a number as a product of its prime factors using a factor tree.

1.title: Prime Factorization
1.objective: I can write a number as a product of its prime factors using a factor tree.

2.title: Greatest Common Factor
2.objective: I can find the greatest common factor (GCF) of two numbers by listing or comparing their factors.

3.title: Least Common Multiple
3.objective: I can find the least common multiple (LCM) of two numbers by listing or comparing their multiples.

4.title: Divide Multi-Digit Numbers
4.objective: I can divide multi-digit whole numbers and explain the meaning of the quotient and remainder.

5.title: Add and Subtract Decimals
5.objective: I can add and subtract decimals by lining up the place values and the decimal points.

6.title: Multiply Decimals
6.objective: I can multiply decimals and place the decimal point correctly in the product.

7.title: Divide Decimals
7.objective: I can divide with decimals by making the divisor a whole number first.

8.title: Interpret Division of Fractions
8.objective: I can use models to interpret what it means to divide by a fraction.

9.title: Interpret Division of Fractions
9.objective: I can use models to interpret what it means to divide by a fraction.

10.title: Divide Whole Numbers by Fractions
10.objective: I can divide a whole number by a fraction by multiplying by the reciprocal.

11.title: Divide Fractions
11.objective: I can divide a fraction by a fraction by multiplying by the reciprocal and simplifying.

12.title: Divide Mixed Numbers
12.objective: I can divide mixed numbers by first changing them to improper fractions.

13.title: Fraction Division Problem Solving
13.objective: I can solve real-world problems by writing and solving fraction division equations.

14.title: Understand Ratios
14.objective: I can write and describe a ratio that compares two quantities.

15.title: Understand Ratios
15.objective: I can write and describe a ratio that compares two quantities.

16.title: Ratio Tables
16.objective: I can use a ratio table to find equivalent ratios.

17.title: Graph Ratio Tables
17.objective: I can graph the values from a ratio table as points on the coordinate plane.

18.title: Equivalent Ratios
18.objective: I can find and check equivalent ratios using multiplication and division.

19.title: Compare Ratios
19.objective: I can compare ratios by finding unit rates or using equivalent ratios.

20.title: Use Ratio Reasoning
20.objective: I can use ratio reasoning to solve problems with proportions and scaling.

21.title: Ratio and Rate Problem Solving
21.objective: I can solve real-world rate problems by finding and using unit rates.

22.title: Rates and Unit Rates
22.objective: I can find a unit rate to compare prices and decide the better buy.

23.title: Rates and Unit Rates
23.objective: I can find a unit rate to compare prices and decide the better buy.

24.title: Relate Fractions, Decimals, and Percents
24.objective: I can write equivalent fractions, decimals, and percents for the same value.

25.title: Percents Greater Than 100% and Less Than 1%
25.objective: I can write and interpret percents greater than 100% and less than 1%.

26.title: Find the Percent of a Number
26.objective: I can find the percent of a number using an equation or a model.

27.title: Use Percent to Solve Problems
27.objective: I can solve problems involving discounts, markups, tax, and tips using percents.

28.title: Convert Measurement Units
28.objective: I can convert measurement units using ratios and conversion factors.

29.title: Solve Problems with Unit Rates
29.objective: I can solve real-world problems by using unit rates to compare options.

30.title: Area of Parallelograms
30.objective: I can find the area of a parallelogram using base × height.

31.title: Area of Trapezoids
31.objective: I can find the area of a trapezoid using the formula A = ½(b1 + b2) × h.

32.title: Area of Triangles
32.objective: I can find the area of a triangle using the formula A = ½ × base × height.

33.title: Area of Triangles
33.objective: I can find the area of a triangle using the formula A = ½ × base × height.

34.title: Area of Regular Polygons
34.objective: I can find the area of a regular polygon by decomposing it into triangles.

35.title: Area of Composite Figures
35.objective: I can find the area of a composite figure by adding or subtracting the areas of basic shapes.

36.title: Powers and Exponents
36.objective: I can write and evaluate numbers in exponent form using a base and a power.

37.title: Powers and Exponents
37.objective: I can write and evaluate numbers in exponent form using a base and a power.

38.title: Evaluate Expressions
38.objective: I can evaluate algebraic expressions by substituting values for the variables.

39.title: Write Algebraic Expressions
39.objective: I can write algebraic expressions from words and real-world situations.

40.title: Properties of Operations
40.objective: I can use the commutative, associative, and identity properties to rewrite expressions.

41.title: The Distributive Property
41.objective: I can use the distributive property to expand and factor expressions.

42.title: Equivalent Expressions
42.objective: I can show that two expressions are equivalent by simplifying and combining like terms.

43.title: Simplify Algebraic Expressions
43.objective: I can simplify algebraic expressions by combining like terms.

44.title: Write Equations
44.objective: I can write an equation to represent a real-world situation.

45.title: Write Equations
45.objective: I can write an equation to represent a real-world situation.

46.title: Solve One-Step Addition and Subtraction Equations
46.objective: I can solve one-step addition and subtraction equations using inverse operations.

47.title: Solve Multiplication and Division Equations
47.objective: I can solve one-step multiplication and division equations using inverse operations.

48.title: Write Inequalities
48.objective: I can write inequalities to represent real-world situations.

49.title: Graph Inequalities
49.objective: I can graph the solutions of an inequality on a number line.

50.title: Solve and Graph Inequalities
50.objective: I can solve an inequality and graph its solution set on a number line.

51.title: Equations and Inequalities Problem Solving
51.objective: I can model and solve real-world problems using equations and inequalities.

52.title: Statistical Questions and Data
52.objective: I can tell the difference between a statistical question and a non-statistical question.

53.title: Statistical Questions and Data
53.objective: I can tell the difference between a statistical question and a non-statistical question.

54.title: Mean, Median, and Mode
54.objective: I can find the mean, median, and mode of a data set.

55.title: Mean Absolute Deviation
55.objective: I can find the mean absolute deviation (MAD) to describe how spread out data is.

56.title: Appropriate Measures
56.objective: I can choose the best measure of center for a data set based on its shape.

57.title: Display Data: Box Plots
57.objective: I can make and read a box plot to summarize a data set.

58.title: Display Data: Histograms
58.objective: I can make and read a histogram to display data in intervals.

59.title: Shape of Data Distributions
59.objective: I can describe the shape of a data distribution as symmetric, skewed, or having clusters and gaps.

60.title: Graph on the Coordinate Plane
60.objective: I can plot and identify points on the coordinate plane using ordered pairs.

61.title: Graph on the Coordinate Plane
61.objective: I can plot and identify points on the coordinate plane using ordered pairs.

62.title: Integers and Absolute Value
62.objective: I can identify integers and find their absolute value.

63.title: Compare and Order Integers
63.objective: I can compare and order integers using a number line.

64.title: Rational Numbers on the Number Line
64.objective: I can place rational numbers, including fractions and decimals, on a number line.

65.title: Ordered Pairs in All Four Quadrants
65.objective: I can plot ordered pairs in all four quadrants of the coordinate plane.

66.title: Distance on the Coordinate Plane
66.objective: I can find the distance between two points on the coordinate plane using absolute value.

67.title: Reflect Points Across Axes
67.objective: I can reflect points across the x-axis and y-axis on the coordinate plane.

68.title: Volume with Whole Number Edges
68.objective: I can find the volume of a rectangular prism with whole-number edges using length × width × height.

69.title: Volume with Whole Number Edges
69.objective: I can find the volume of a rectangular prism with whole-number edges using length × width × height.

70.title: Volume of Rectangular Prisms
70.objective: I can find the volume of a rectangular prism, including ones with fractional edge lengths, using base area × height.

71.title: Surface Area Using Nets
71.objective: I can find the surface area of a solid by using its net.

72.title: Surface Area of Prisms
72.objective: I can find the surface area of rectangular and triangular prisms.

73.title: Surface Area of Pyramids
73.objective: I can find the surface area of a pyramid by adding the base area and the lateral faces.
